allow: PowerShell($procs = Get-Process -Name powershell -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "Count: $\($procs.Count\)"; $procs | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.Id\)  $\($_.StartTime\)  $\($_.MainWindowTitle\)" })

PowerShell(Set-Location c:\\Projects\\vo\\poker; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; $count = git rev-list --count HEAD; Write-Output "commits: $count"; Write-Output "--- log ---"; git log --oneline -5; Write-Output "--- status ---"; git status --short)

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8765/index.html" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "OK: status=$\($r.StatusCode\), bytes=$\($r.RawContentLength\)" } catch { "ERR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($p = Start-Process -FilePath python -ArgumentList "-m","http.server","8765","--bind","127.0.0.1" -WorkingDirectory "c:\\Projects\\vo\\poker" -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8765 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalAddress,LocalPort,State; "PID=$\($p.Id\) HasExited=$\($p.HasExited\)")

PowerShell($p = Start-Process -FilePath py -ArgumentList "-3","-m","http.server","8765","--bind","127.0.0.1" -WorkingDirectory "c:\\Projects\\vo\\poker" -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; "PID=$\($p.Id\) HasExited=$\($p.HasExited\)"; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8765 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object State)

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8765 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalAddress,State; try { \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8765/index.html" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5\).StatusCode } catch { "ERR $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8765 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { $conn | Format-Table LocalAddress,LocalPort,State,OwningProcess -AutoSize } else { "no listener on 8765" }; "---"; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8765/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "ok status=$\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "ERR $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($path = 'c:\\Projects\\vo\\poker\\index.html'; $content = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\($path, [System.Text.UTF8Encoding]::new\($false\)\); $needle = "      if \(numeric.length\) {`r`n        const avg = numeric.reduce\(\(a, b\) => a + b, 0\) / numeric.length;`r`n          detail += "; if \($content.Contains\($needle\)\) { 'FOUND' } else { 'NOT FOUND' })

PowerShell($path = 'c:\\Projects\\vo\\poker\\index.html'; $content = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\($path, [System.Text.UTF8Encoding]::new\($false\)\); $needle = "      if \(numeric.length\) {`r`n        const avg = numeric.reduce\(\(a, b\) => a + b, 0\) / numeric.length;`r`n          detail += "; $idx = $content.IndexOf\($needle\); $end = $content.IndexOf\("`r`n", $idx + $needle.Length\); $line = $content.Substring\($idx + $needle.Length, $end - \($idx + $needle.Length\)\); [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes\($line\) | ForEach-Object { '{0:X2}' -f $_ } | Select-Object -First 30)
PowerShell(git log --oneline -5 -- index.html; git log -p -- index.html | Select-String -Pattern "renderRoleBreakdown|numeric.length" -Context 2,2 | Select-Object -First 60)

PowerShell($path = 'c:\\Projects\\vo\\poker\\index.html'; $bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($path\); $text = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\($bytes\); $needle = "      if \(numeric.length\) {`r`n        const avg = numeric.reduce\(\(a, b\) => a + b, 0\) / numeric.length;`r`n          detail += ' " + [char]0xC2 + [char]0xB7 + " ø ' + avg.toFixed\(2\).replace\(/\\.00$/, ''\);`r`n        }`r`n      }`r`n"; $repl = "      if \(numeric.length\) {`r`n        const avg = numeric.reduce\(\(a, b\) => a + b, 0\) / numeric.length;`r`n        detail += ' " + [char]0xC2 + [char]0xB7 + " ø ' + avg.toFixed\(2\).replace\(/\\.00$/, ''\);`r`n      }`r`n"; if \($text.Contains\($needle\)\) { $new = $text.Replace\($needle, $repl\); [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\($path, $new, [System.Text.UTF8Encoding]::new\($false\)\); 'OK' } else { 'NOPE' })

PowerShell($path = 'c:\\Projects\\vo\\poker\\index.html'; $bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($path\); $text = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\($bytes\); $mid = "' " + [char]0xC2 + [char]0xB7 + " ø '"; $needle = "      if \(numeric.length\) {`r`n        const avg = numeric.reduce\(\(a, b\) => a + b, 0\) / numeric.length;`r`n          detail += " + $mid + " + avg.toFixed\(2\).replace\(/\\.00`$/, ''\);`r`n        }`r`n      }`r`n"; $repl = "      if \(numeric.length\) {`r`n        const avg = numeric.reduce\(\(a, b\) => a + b, 0\) / numeric.length;`r`n        detail += " + $mid + " + avg.toFixed\(2\).replace\(/\\.00`$/, ''\);`r`n      }`r`n"; if \($text.Contains\($needle\)\) { $new = $text.Replace\($needle, $repl\); [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\($path, $new, [System.Text.UTF8Encoding]::new\($false\)\); 'OK' } else { 'NOPE' })

PowerShell($path = 'c:\\Projects\\vo\\poker\\index.html'; $bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($path\); $text = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\($bytes\); $mid = "' " + [char]0xC2 + [char]0xB7 + ' ø ' + "'"; $needle = "      if \(numeric.length\) {`r`n        const avg = numeric.reduce\(\(a, b\) => a + b, 0\) / numeric.length;`r`n          detail += " + $mid + " + avg.toFixed\(2\).replace\(/\\.00`$/, ''\);`r`n        }`r`n      }`r`n"; $repl = "      if \(numeric.length\) {`r`n        const avg = numeric.reduce\(\(a, b\) => a + b, 0\) / numeric.length;`r`n        detail += " + $mid + " + avg.toFixed\(2\).replace\(/\\.00`$/, ''\);`r`n      }`r`n"; if \($text.Contains\($needle\)\) { $new = $text.Replace\($needle, $repl\); [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\($path, $new, [System.Text.UTF8Encoding]::new\($false\)\); 'OK' } else { 'NOPE' })

PowerShell($path = 'c:\\Projects\\vo\\poker\\index.html'; $bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($path\); $text = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\($bytes\); $mid = "' " + [char]0xC2 + [char]0xB7 + " ø '"; $needle = "      if \(numeric.length\) {`r`n        const avg = numeric.reduce\(\(a, b\) => a + b, 0\) / numeric.length;`r`n          detail += " + $mid + " + avg.toFixed\(2\).replace\(/\\.00`$/, ''\);`r`n        }`r`n      }`r`n"; if \($text.Contains\($needle\)\) { 'FOUND' } else { 'NOT FOUND' })

PowerShell($path = 'c:\\Projects\\vo\\poker\\index.html'; $content = Get-Content $path -Raw; $start = $content.IndexOf\('<script>'\); $end = $content.LastIndexOf\('</script>'\); $script = $content.Substring\($start + 8, $end - $start - 8\); $tmp = [System.IO.Path]::GetTempFileName\(\) + '.js'; Set-Content -Path $tmp -Value $script -Encoding UTF8; node --check $tmp; Remove-Item $tmp)
PowerShell(git log --oneline -- .claude/settings.local.json | Select-Object -First 5; Write-Output "---"; git ls-files .claude/)
